commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 9. "For He spake, and they were made:" for no other one made those things which are to fear; but He spake, and they were made. "He commanded, and they were created" (ver. 9): He commanded by His Word, and they were created.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Created. Hebrew, "on foot "to express God's absolute dominion. (Calmet)
This passage shows that bra means properly created out of nothing, Genesis i. Matter did not exist before God spoke. (Berthier)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
